fields.Name: Trailing 30 Days
fields.Description: Rolling 30-day window ending at the as-of date. Short-term recency signals (recent logins, recent opens).

fields.Name: Trailing 90 Days
fields.Description: Rolling 90-day window ending at the as-of date. The default window for most engagement factors.

fields.Name: Trailing 12 Months
fields.Description: Rolling 12-month window ending at the as-of date. Annual-cadence signals (event attendance, dues, certifications).

fields.Name: All Time
fields.Description: No time bound; aggregates over the entire history of the related entity (e.g. lifetime giving, total certifications earned).

fields.Name: Renewal Window (-90 days)
fields.Description: The 90 days leading up to each member's renewal date. Lets decay close to renewal be weighted differently from decay far out.
